LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA, DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION'S MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE MOTION IS GRANTED. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-06-2017 Continued To Nov-22-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA, DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION's MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE is Granted. Plaintiff filed a notice of non-opposition. The case is transferred to Solano County. Plaintiff shall pay the transfer fees. Order is signed. Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Gordon Aiavao, CSR #11216, gaiavao@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/CPK)
